name_en: 🚚 OHANEL 🆕 Double Suede 🚩🚩🚩 25P New Rhombus Basket Bag Shopping Bag 🧺✨ Vintage gold hardware, double C, logo, plus the basket bag shape, the vintage flavor comes out instantly. Super large space to meet all your capacity needs, comes with a hand handle and long hardware chain ⛓ Can be single shoulder, crossbody, or hand-held. Soft and fine suede, great texture and feel! Length 36 Width 11.5 Height 32
